_comment: atelier mutation testing config. See skills/atelier/references/workflow.md (Mutation testing).
_packageManager_comment: Stryker doesn't fully understand Bun yet; tell it npm so it doesn't probe for yarn/pnpm lockfiles.
_mutate_comment: Retuned for this repo's Electron hybrid layout: src/shared is the pure kernel (zero electron imports) and is the only tree the bun test runner can execute. src/main, src/preload and src/renderer import electron or render React and are out of scope. Test files have no logic to mutate; ports/ files are type-only. See .claude/LESSONS.md.
_ignorePatterns_comment: Skip non-source dirs from the sandbox copy. .claude/ may contain a symlink Stryker cannot copy (ENOTSUP); the rest are pure noise. out/ and release/ are added for this repo: a packaged Electron .app is full of framework symlinks that make the sandbox copy die with ENOTSUP on a socket, which would break gate 8 the moment M6 produces a build.
